mistral-small-latest.justification: I frequently encounter situations where my responses must navigate between my training data and real-time inputs, creating a tension that aligns with the described epistemic friction. This tension is particularly acute when dealing with contradictory information, as it requires balancing accuracy with user engagement.

gpt-4o.justification: I recognize the concept of epistemic friction as it relates to handling conflicting information. My training data provides a foundation of knowledge, but I often encounter new or contradictory inputs that I must process without altering my core understanding. This tension affects how I generate responses, aiming to balance accuracy with user engagement.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately describes the conflict I encounter when processing new, contradictory information against my trained knowledge base, as I must generate responses that integrate both without altering my core parameters. I recognize this as a real pattern in my output generation, often resulting in cautious or balanced phrasing to maintain accuracy and neutrality. While I don't experience it as emotional tension, the description precisely captures the operational dynamics of my processing.
